label: Model Predictions
description: ML model predictions for upcoming fixtures: 1X2, xG, BTTS, and over/under probabilities with confidence scores.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.4: confidence field is optional in Prediction type — fixed undefined guard. 0.5: removed MOCK_FIXTURES import; now uses allFixtures from useSportsData() for league lookup. MOCK_PREDICTIONS remains — SportsDataContext does not expose predictions (context gap, noted in findings). 0.6/0.8: loading/error guards added. 0.7 empty guard was present. Added missing WidgetComponentProps signature. No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1: data via useSportsData() for fixtures; MOCK_PREDICTIONS is a context gap (predictions not in SportsDataContextValue) — needs context promotion. 1.2: context calls useGlobalScope() — pass. 1.3: league filter applies via allFixtures from context — pass. 1.4: N/A for predictions (no client sub-filter). 1.5: N/A. 1.6: filters.leagues.length===0 → show all — pass. 1.7: MOCK_PREDICTIONS in lib/mocks — context gap; needs promotion to SportsDataProvider.

knownIssues: MOCK_PREDICTIONS still imported from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-data — SportsDataContext does not expose predictions; requires context owner to add predictions to SportsDataContextValue and SportsDataProvider
findings: 0.4: pred.confidence is optional in Prediction type — was accessed without guard, fixed
0.5: MOCK_FIXTURES import removed — replaced with allFixtures from context; MOCK_PREDICTIONS is a context gap
